WANDERER-ENSHRINED.title: Enshrined
WANDERER-SHIFT.title: Shift
WANDERER-REMOVE_DISHONOR.title: Remove Dishonor
WANDERER-REMOVE_DISHONOR.description:
An [purple]Ofuda[/purple]-[gold]shifted[/gold] Dishonor is removed when played.
Perform [gold]Misogi[/gold] at Rest sites to remove all Dishonor.
WANDERER-REFILL.title: Refill
WANDERER-REFILL.description: This card is [gold]Shifted[/gold] after being played. When [gold]Shifted[/gold] again, it returns to its original form.
